answers.label: I have a Master's degree or higher
Creating technology — writing code, building apps, or working with AI
A mix of both depending on the task
Analytical — I like logic, data, and figuring out how things work

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in software developer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: AWS Cloud Solutions Architect Professional Certificate on Coursera
Google IT Automation with Python Professional Certificate
freeCodeCamp Back End Development and APIs Certification
Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate
IBM Cloud Native Microservices Architecture Professional Certificate on edX

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in programming (python, java, or c++), data structures and algorithms, and version control (git) — these are the essential building blocks for a software developer

resources.title: Python for Everybody Specialization
Data Structures & Algorithms Tutorials
Version Control with Git & GitHub
MDN Web Docs (HTML, CSS, JavaScript Fundamentals)
W3Schools SQL Tutorial

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in restful api development, database management (sql), and debugging and troubleshooting, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: software developer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Coursera
software developer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Udemy
software developer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying programming (python, java, or c++), and data structures and algorithms in realistic scenarios

resources.title: software developer — Hands-on Practice courses on Coursera
software developer — Hands-on Practice courses on Udemy
software developer — Hands-on Practice tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

resources.title: software developer — Portfolio Building courses on Coursera
software developer — Portfolio Building courses on Udemy
software developer — Portfolio Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your software developer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: software developer — CV / Profile Building courses on Coursera
software developer — CV / Profile Building courses on Udemy
software developer — CV / Profile Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for software developer positions on job boards, company career pages, and freelance platforms (Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal) — tailor each application to the role and be ready to showcase your portfolio in interviews
